summary: Successfully ran 5 core integration tests validating end-to-end meeting pipeline. Tested: (1) JSONL transcript ingestion, (2) Folder-based transcript ingestion, (3) Duplicate detection with 100% similarity matching, (4) Archive structure validation, (5) Registry statistics. All core pipeline components functioning correctly.
learnings: Meeting orchestrator successfully processes both JSONL and folder transcripts
Duplicate detection working with 100% similarity scoring
Registry correctly tracking meetings with comprehensive statistics
Block generation requires separate script execution - not automatic in orchestrator
Archive structure verified showing full B** block ecosystem in existing meetings
Integration tests should focus on core pipeline validation rather than exhaustive edge cases
